ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election being contested */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Total votes received by the candidate */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total votes */,
  "swing" REAL /* Percentage swing compared to previous election */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific constituency */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district within the constituency */,
  "incumbent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the candidate is an incumbent */,
  "campaign_website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's campaign website */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* JSON object to store social media handles */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Text field for a brief biography of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the political party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party name */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Brief description of the party's ideology */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the party's official website */,
  "logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the party's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election (e.g., Federal Election 2023) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., local, state, federal) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the election is held */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific constituency */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district within the constituency */,
  "early_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for early voting */,
  "early_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date for early voting */,
  "voting_system" TEXT /* Type of voting system used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnout record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters */,
  "voters_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "early_voters" INTEGER /* Number of early voters */,
  "absentee_voters" INTEGER /* Number of absentee voters */,
  "provisional_voters" INTEGER /* Number of provisional voters */,
  "valid_voters" INTEGER /* Number of valid votes cast */,
  "invalid_voters" INTEGER /* Number of invalid votes cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_places" (
  "polling_place_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polling place */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the polling place */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of voters at the polling place */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Time the polling place opens */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Time the polling place closes */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the polling place */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the polling place is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the polling place is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the polling place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("polling_place_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_places_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each results record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total votes counted in this election */,
  "winning_party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the winning party's ID */,
  "valid_votes" INTEGER /* Number of valid votes counted */,
  "invalid_votes" INTEGER /* Number of invalid votes counted */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "early_votes" INTEGER /* Number of early votes counted */,
  "absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes counted */,
  "provisional_votes" INTEGER /* Number of provisional votes counted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "swing_analysis" (
  "swing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each swing record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "previous_votes" INTEGER /* Votes received in the previous election */,
  "current_votes" INTEGER /* Votes received in the current election */,
  "swing_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in votes */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific constituency */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district within the constituency */,
  "previous_election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the previous election for comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("swing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_swing_analysis_previous_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_swing_analysis_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of voters */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of voters */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of voters */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of voters */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of voters */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of voters */,
  "voter_registration_date" TEXT /* Date when voters registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_demographics_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the voter comment */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the comment was submitted */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user submitting the comment */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to submit the comment */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the comment is approved for display */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voters" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the voter */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the voter */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voter */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the voter supports */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the voter */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the voter */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the voter */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the voter resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the voter resides */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the voter */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the voter registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object to store specific permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the change */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to make the change */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module where the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user receiving the notification */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to receive the notification */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
